summary: Testing completed for BidBlitz new features. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). Web App homepage and Admin Panel mobile responsiveness verified. Achievements API returns 18 achievements, Winner Gallery API returns feed entries, Login API returns token correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404). Mobile app api.js references this endpoint but it's not implemented in backend.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1. Charts may not render properly on initial load. This is a Recharts library issue with container sizing.

frontend_tests.homepage: PASS - Loads correctly with BidBlitz branding, jackpot, mystery boxes visible
frontend_tests.login: PASS - Login form works, redirects to admin panel for admin users
frontend_tests.admin_panel_desktop: PASS - Full sidebar visible with all menu items
frontend_tests.admin_panel_tablet: PASS - Sidebar hidden, hamburger menu visible
frontend_tests.admin_panel_mobile: PASS - Sidebar hidden, bottom navigation bar visible

GET /api/achievements/all.returns: 18 achievements with categories: bidding, winning, special, social, loyalty

GET /api/achievements/my-achievements.returns: User achievements with earned status and stats

GET /api/winner-gallery/feed.returns: Gallery entries (currently empty), total count, has_more flag

POST /api/auth/login.returns: JWT token and user object with bids_balance

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about Recharts chart dimensions - may need to add explicit width/height or use ResponsiveContainer properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for achievements and winner gallery are working. Admin panel mobile responsiveness is properly implemented with md:hidden classes. Mobile app screens (BuyItNow, Achievements, WinnerGallery) are integrated in navigation. The /api/user-stats/my-stats endpoint referenced in mobile app doesn't exist - mobile app uses /api/user/bids instead.
